markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 28, 2026 12 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 89.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 89.99° on Jun 28, 2026 at 12pm EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jack Flaherty has 16+ outs recorded in the Houston vs Detroit professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 1:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Jack Flaherty is scratched or is not a starting pitcher, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jack Flaherty is not a starting pitcher but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, relief appearances will not count towards this market.
If Jack Flaherty is a starting pitcher and records at least one pitch the market will settle based on outs recorded.
markets.title: Jack Flaherty: 16+ Outs Recorded?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Ketel Marte records 1+ stolen bases in Arizona vs Tampa Bay professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 1:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ketel Marte is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Ketel Marte starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Ketel Marte is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Ketel Marte is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on stolen bases recorded.
markets.title: Ketel Marte: 1+ stolen bases?
